```{=html}
<div style="width:86%;margin:0 auto;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1.3em 1.2em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- the effect: three bottles in one matched set -->
 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:0.85em;">
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.5em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5654A2;text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0 0.5em;">Cooking Oil</div>
   <img src="figs/cooking-oil.png" alt="Cooking oil" style="display:block;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:9px;" />
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.5em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5654A2;text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0 0.5em;">Light Soy Sauce</div>
   <img src="figs/light-soy-sauce.png" alt="Light soy sauce" style="display:block;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:9px;" />
  </div>
  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.5em;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(44,62,80,0.12);border:1px solid #EFE6D6;">
   <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.42em;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#5654A2;text-align:center;padding:0.35em 0 0.5em;">Tomato Paste</div>
   <img src="figs/tomato-paste.png" alt="Tomato paste" style="display:block;width:100%;height:auto;border-radius:9px;" />
  </div>
 </div>

 <!-- divider -->
 <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#C4C3E8,transparent);margin:1em 0 0.9em;"></div>

 <!-- the three moves that pin everything but the liquid -->
 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:0.8em;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.85em;border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(44,132,117,0.10);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;">
     <i data-lucide="image" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;white-space:nowrap;">Template</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.46em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-top:0.5em;">One base bottle for every cooking liquid.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.85em;border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(44,132,117,0.10);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;">
     <i data-lucide="file-code" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;white-space:nowrap;">Script</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.46em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-top:0.5em;">Image-to-image scripts based on the template.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:12px;padding:0.75em 0.85em;border:1px solid rgba(44,132,117,0.22);box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(44,132,117,0.10);text-align:left;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.55em;">
    <div style="width:1.9em;height:1.9em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;">
     <i data-lucide="pen-line" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i>
    </div>
    <div style="font-size:0.5em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;white-space:nowrap;">Post-processing</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.46em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;margin-top:0.5em;">Label stamped afterwards: fixed font, size, and color.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
